  • Method Details

    • outputFormat

      public ExtractLayerAttributesRequest outputFormat(String outputFormat)

    • getOutputFormat

      @NotNull public @NotNull String getOutputFormat()
      Output format. The allowed formats are configured per instance using `tailormap-api.extract.allowed-outputformats`. The (default) geometry is included even if not requested.
      Returns:
      outputFormat

    • setOutputFormat

      public void setOutputFormat(String outputFormat)

    • attributes

    • addAttributesItem

      public ExtractLayerAttributesRequest addAttributesItem(String attributesItem)

    • getAttributes

      public List<String> getAttributes()
      Attributes to include in export. If omitted or empty, all configured attributes are exported. Attribute item order is significant.
      Returns:
      attributes

    • setAttributes

      public void setAttributes(List<String> attributes)

    • filter

      public ExtractLayerAttributesRequest filter(String filter)

      public String getFilter()
      ECQL filter. See description for /app/{appId}/layer/{layerId}/features.
      Returns:
      filter

      public ExtractLayerAttributesRequest.SortOrderEnum getSortOrder()
      Sort order for sortBy. Ignored if sortBy is not set. See description for /app/{appId}/layer/{layerId}/features.

      sortOrder
